channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors may reduce risk of total joint arthroplasty in osteoarthritis
item.description: 1. Initiation of centrally acting analgesics in patients with osteoarthritis (OA) was associated with a higher long-term risk of total joint arthropla...

item.title: NICE Backs New Targeted Therapy for Advanced Cervical Cancer
item.description: NICE has recommended a new treatment option for adults with recurrent or metastatic cervical cancer that has progressed on or after systemic therapy. ...

item.title: Can AI help predict how you might be feeling in the future?
item.description: From the weather to sports to the performance of the stock market, predictions are a regular feature of our lives. Most of these sectors rely on past ...

item.title: Rural GI Workforce Stable in the US, but Concerns Exist
item.description: The total number of gastroenterologists increased in the US from 2014 to 2025, but the proportion practicing in rural areas stayed at about 7.5%. Meds...
